seo.title: The GripAble Sensor | Able Care
seo.description: One best-in-class sensor, many applications. A dedicated page on the GripAble sensor is coming soon. In the meantime, talk to our team.

blocks.headline: The GripAble Sensor
blocks.subtitle: One best-in-class sensor, many applications. A dedicated page covering specifications, accuracy, validation and applications is on the way.

blocks.heading: Full details coming soon
blocks.body: We're putting together a dedicated home for the GripAble sensor — covering hardware specs, the science behind the measurement, clinical validation, and every application it powers across falls prevention, grip strength, rehabilitation and research. If there's something specific you'd like to know now, we'd love to hear from you.

blocks.heading: Want to know more before the page is live?
blocks.body: Our team can walk you through the sensor's specifications, accuracy data and the applications most relevant to you.
